messages.content: Buatkan game edukasi: judul="Laboratorium Gerak", jenjang=SMA-10, mata_pelajaran=Fisika, topik=Istilah-istilah dalam kinematika, kesulitan=2, jenis=word_game

{"schema_version": "1.2", "game_id": "game_phys10_kin_word_001", "game_type": "word_game", "metadata": {"title": "Laboratorium Gerak", "subject": "Fisika", "grade_level": "SMA-10", "bab": "Kinematika", "subbab": "Besaran dalam Gerak Lurus", "topik": "Istilah-istilah dalam kinematika", "difficulty": 2, "estimated_duration_minutes": 8, "learning_objectives": ["Siswa dapat mengenali istilah penting dalam kinematika", "Siswa dapat membedakan besaran skalar dan vektor"], "language": "id"}, "presentation": {"opening": {"id": "opening_001", "show_once": true, "title": "Arsip Ilmuwan", "story": "Seorang ilmuwan meninggalkan catatan penting tentang gerak benda, tapi istilahnya teracak. Susun kembali kata-kata ini!", "image_description": "Ilustrasi laboratorium klasik dengan papan tulis berisi coretan, cahaya sore dari jendela", "cta_text": "Mulai Menyusun"}, "visual_element": {"theme_name": "Classroom Laboratory", "theme_preset": "classroom", "mood": "warm, curious, inviting", "color_palette": {"primary": "#ef8354", "secondary": "#4f5d75", "background": "#fdf6e3", "accent": "#2d3142", "text": "#2d3142"}, "setting_description": "Ruang kelas fisika hangat dengan papan tulis hijau, meja kayu, cahaya sore dari jendela.", "art_style": "flat cartoon with warm gradients", "ambient_elements": ["Partikel debu halus di cahaya", "Buku-buku di rak background"]}, "instructions": {"id": "howto_001", "trigger": {"type": "popup_button", "position": "top_right", "icon": "question_mark", "label": "Petunjuk"}, "steps": [{"step": 1, "text": "Perhatikan huruf-huruf acak yang ditampilkan."}, {"step": 2, "text": "Ketik jawabanmu di kotak input."}, {"step": 3, "text": "Tekan Enter untuk cek jawaban."}, {"step": 4, "text": "Kamu punya 3 nyawa. Jawaban salah mengurangi 1 nyawa."}]}, "hint": {"id": "hint_001", "scope": "global", "trigger": {"type": "auto_popup", "after_seconds": 60, "dismissible": true, "reusable": true, "manual_trigger_available": true}, "content": {"title": "Strategi Menyusun", "strategy": "Istilah kinematika sering berakhiran '-an' atau '-si'. Pikirkan besaran fisika: ada yang mengukur jarak, waktu, kecepatan, perubahannya.", "formula": null, "example": "Huruf 'KACEJARAN' bisa disusun jadi 'KECEPATAN'.", "hint_image_description": null}}, "audio": {"enabled": true, "tracks": [{"id": "sfx_correct", "event": "on_correct_action", "description": "Ding ceria singkat"}, {"id": "sfx_wrong", "event": "on_wrong_action", "description": "Buzz lembut"}, {"id": "sfx_win", "event": "on_win", "description": "Fanfare 8-bit 2 detik"}, {"id": "sfx_lose", "event": "on_lose", "description": "Nada turun 1.5 detik"}]}}, "payload": {"word_game_subtype": "anagram", "intro_narrative": "Susun 5 istilah kinematika!", "items": [{"id": "w_001", "scrambled": "KARJA", "answer": "JARAK", "explanation": "Panjang lintasan total, besaran skalar.", "points": 10}, {"id": "w_002", "scrambled": "NAHPINAGREP", "answer": "PERPINDAHAN", "explanation": "Perubahan posisi, besaran vektor.", "points": 10}, {"id": "w_003", "scrambled": "TANEPECEK", "answer": "KECEPATAN", "explanation": "Perpindahan per waktu, vektor.", "points": 10}, {"id": "w_004", "scrambled": "JANUALEK", "answer": "KELAJUAN", "explanation": "Jarak per waktu, skalar.", "points": 10}, {"id": "w_005", "scrambled": "NAHCAPEPRTE", "answer": "PERCEPATAN", "explanation": "Perubahan kecepatan per waktu, m/s².", "points": 10}], "outro_narrative": "Arsip terbuka! Kamu siap mempelajari gerak."}, "win_lose_condition": {"applicable": true, "win": {"description": "Benar minimal 4 dari 5", "logic": "correct_count >= 4", "feedback_text": "Hebat! Kamu menguasai istilah kinematika.", "feedback_audio": "sfx_win"}, "lose": {"description": "Kehabisan nyawa", "logic": "lives <= 0", "feedback_text": "Belum berhasil. Coba lagi!", "feedback_audio": "sfx_lose", "retry_allowed": true}}, "gameplay_parameters": {"scoring": {"correct": 10, "wrong": -2, "bonus_time": 5}, "lives": 3, "time_limit_seconds": 300, "pass_threshold": 70}}
Buatkan game edukasi: judul="Detektif Turunan", jenjang=SMA-11, mata_pelajaran=Matematika, topik=Turunan fungsi aljabar, kesulitan=3, jenis=puzzle_game

{"schema_version": "1.2", "game_id": "game_math11_deriv_puzzle_001", "game_type": "puzzle_game", "metadata": {"title": "Detektif Turunan", "subject": "Matematika", "grade_level": "SMA-11", "bab": "Kalkulus Diferensial", "subbab": "Turunan Fungsi Aljabar", "topik": "Turunan fungsi aljabar", "difficulty": 3, "estimated_duration_minutes": 12, "learning_objectives": ["Siswa dapat menghitung turunan polinomial", "Siswa dapat mencocokkan fungsi dengan turunannya"], "language": "id"}, "presentation": {"opening": {"id": "opening_001", "show_once": true, "title": "Kasus Fungsi Hilang", "story": "Agen Matematika! Potongan fungsi dan turunannya tercampur. Pasangkan untuk memecahkan kasus!", "image_description": "Meja detektif dengan kaca pembesar di atas kertas berisi rumus, gaya noir", "cta_text": "Mulai Investigasi"}, "visual_element": {"theme_name": "Neon Detective", "theme_preset": "scifi_neon", "mood": "mysterious, sharp, focused", "color_palette": {"primary": "#e94560", "secondary": "#16c79a", "background": "#1a1a2e", "accent": "#f5f5f5", "text": "#f5f5f5"}, "setting_description": "Ruang investigasi gelap dengan lampu neon merah-hijau, papan kasus dengan benang merah penghubung.", "art_style": "flat minimalist with neon glow", "ambient_elements": ["Asap tipis", "Cahaya neon berdenyut pelan"]}, "instructions": {"id": "howto_001", "trigger": {"type": "popup_button", "position": "top_right", "icon": "question_mark", "label": "Petunjuk"}, "steps": [{"step": 1, "text": "Baca fungsi f(x) yang tersedia."}, {"step": 2, "text": "Klik fungsi, lalu klik turunan yang cocok."}, {"step": 3, "text": "Hijau = benar, merah = salah. Salah bisa diulang."}, {"step": 4, "text": "Selesaikan semua 5 pasangan untuk menang."}]}, "hint": {"id": "hint_001", "scope": "global", "trigger": {"type": "auto_popup", "after_seconds": 60, "dismissible": true, "reusable": true, "manual_trigger_available": true}, "content": {"title": "Aturan Dasar Turunan", "strategy": "Gunakan aturan pangkat. Konstanta hilang saat diturunkan, koefisien tetap mengalikan hasil.", "formula": "d/dx(a·x^n) = a·n·x^(n-1)", "example": "Turunan 3x² = 6x. Turunan 5 = 0.", "hint_image_description": null}}, "audio": {"enabled": true, "tracks": [{"id": "sfx_match", "event": "on_correct_action", "description": "Click memuaskan"}, {"id": "sfx_wrong", "event": "on_wrong_action", "description": "Buzz singkat"}, {"id": "sfx_win", "event": "on_win", "description": "Fanfare misteri terpecahkan"}, {"id": "bgm", "event": "background", "description": "Jazz noir pelan loop"}]}}, "payload": {"puzzle_subtype": "matching", "intro_narrative": "Pasangkan 5 fungsi dengan turunannya.", "pairs": [{"id": "p_001", "left": {"type": "formula", "content": "f(x) = 3x² + 2x"}, "right": {"type": "formula", "content": "f'(x) = 6x + 2"}, "explanation": "3·2x + 2·1 = 6x + 2."}, {"id": "p_002", "left": {"type": "formula", "content": "f(x) = x³ - 4x"}, "right": {"type": "formula", "content": "f'(x) = 3x² - 4"}, "explanation": "Turunan x³=3x², -4x=-4."}, {"id": "p_003", "left": {"type": "formula", "content": "f(x) = 5x⁴"}, "right": {"type": "formula", "content": "f'(x) = 20x³"}, "explanation": "5·4x³ = 20x³."}, {"id": "p_004", "left": {"type": "formula", "content": "f(x) = 2x + 7"}, "right": {"type": "formula", "content": "f'(x) = 2"}, "explanation": "Konstanta 7 hilang."}, {"id": "p_005", "left": {"type": "formula", "content": "f(x) = x⁵ - x²"}, "right": {"type": "formula", "content": "f'(x) = 5x⁴ - 2x"}, "explanation": "5x⁴ dari x⁵, 2x dari x²."}], "distractors": ["f'(x) = 6x² + 2", "f'(x) = 3x³ - 4x", "f'(x) = x⁴"]}, "win_lose_condition": {"applicable": true, "win": {"description": "Semua 5 pasangan benar", "logic": "correct_pairs == 5", "feedback_text": "Kasus terpecahkan!", "feedback_audio": "sfx_win"}, "lose": {"description": "Lebih dari 3 kesalahan", "logic": "wrong_attempts > 3", "feedback_text": "Kasus belum terpecahkan. Coba lagi.", "feedback_audio": null, "retry_allowed": true}}, "gameplay_parameters": {"scoring": {"correct_pair": 20, "wrong_attempt": -5}, "lives": null, "time_limit_seconds": 600, "pass_threshold": 80}}
Buatkan game edukasi: judul="Reaktor Fotolistrik", jenjang=SMA-12, mata_pelajaran=Fisika, topik=Efek fotolistrik, kesulitan=4, jenis=sim_lab

{"schema_version": "1.2", "game_id": "game_phys12_photo_sim_001", "game_type": "sim_lab", "metadata": {"title": "Reaktor Fotolistrik", "subject": "Fisika", "grade_level": "SMA-12", "bab": "Fisika Kuantum", "subbab": "Efek Fotolistrik", "topik": "Efek fotolistrik", "difficulty": 4, "estimated_duration_minutes": 15, "learning_objectives": ["Siswa dapat menjelaskan hubungan frekuensi cahaya dengan energi kinetik elektron", "Siswa dapat menentukan frekuensi ambang berbagai logam"], "language": "id"}, "presentation": {"opening": {"id": "opening_001", "show_once": true, "title": "Laboratorium Kuantum", "story": "Selamat datang di laboratorium kuantum! Tembakkan cahaya ke berbagai logam dan amati bagaimana elektron terlepas. Jelajahi batas frekuensi ambang setiap logam.", "image_description": "Laboratorium fisika modern dengan laser biru menyinari plat logam, elektron digambarkan sebagai titik cahaya", "cta_text": "Mulai Eksperimen"}, "visual_element": {"theme_name": "Quantum Lab Neon", "theme_preset": "scifi_neon", "mood": "precise, futuristic, exploratory", "color_palette": {"primary": "#00f5ff", "secondary": "#ff00aa", "background": "#0a0a1f", "accent": "#ffee00", "text": "#ffffff"}, "setting_description": "Laboratorium kuantum dengan panel holografik, cahaya neon biru-magenta, grid cahaya di latar belakang.", "art_style": "flat design with neon glow accents", "ambient_elements": ["Partikel cahaya melayang", "Grid holografik samar", "Glow pulse pada elemen aktif"]}, "instructions": {"id": "howto_001", "trigger": {"type": "popup_button", "position": "top_right", "icon": "question_mark", "label": "Petunjuk"}, "steps": [{"step": 1, "text": "Pilih jenis logam target."}, {"step": 2, "text": "Atur frekuensi cahaya dengan slider."}, {"step": 3, "text": "Amati energi kinetik elektron pada grafik."}, {"step": 4, "text": "Eksplorasi: temukan frekuensi ambang tiap logam!"}]}, "hint": {"id": "hint_001", "scope": "global", "trigger": {"type": "auto_popup", "after_seconds": 60, "dismissible": true, "reusable": true, "manual_trigger_available": true}, "content": {"title": "Persamaan Einstein", "strategy": "Energi kinetik elektron = energi foton dikurangi work function logam. Jika hasilnya negatif, tidak ada elektron terlepas (di bawah frekuensi ambang).", "formula": "KE = h·f - W", "example": "Untuk Cesium (W=2.1 eV), pada f=6×10¹⁴ Hz: KE = 4.136e-15 × 6e14 - 2.1 ≈ 0.38 eV.", "hint_image_description": null}}, "audio": {"enabled": true, "tracks": [{"id": "sfx_emit", "event": "on_correct_action", "description": "Suara elektron terlepas, halus elektronik"}, {"id": "bgm", "event": "background", "description": "Ambient elektronik lembut loop"}]}}, "payload": {"sim_subtype": "physics_quantum", "scenario": {"title": "Laboratorium Fotolistrik", "narrative": "Tembakkan cahaya dengan frekuensi berbeda ke permukaan logam dan amati elektron yang terlepas.", "context": "Eksperimen efek fotolistrik dengan berbagai logam dan rentang frekuensi cahaya."}, "variables": [{"id": "freq", "label": "Frekuensi cahaya", "symbol": "f", "unit": "10¹⁴ Hz", "type": "user_input", "min": 1, "max": 20, "default": 5, "step": 0.5}, {"id": "metal", "label": "Jenis logam", "type": "user_input", "options": [{"value": "cesium", "label": "Cesium", "work_function": 2.1}, {"value": "sodium", "label": "Natrium", "work_function": 2.3}, {"value": "zinc", "label": "Seng", "work_function": 4.3}], "default": "cesium"}, {"id": "ke", "label": "Energi kinetik elektron", "symbol": "KE", "unit": "eV", "type": "computed"}], "equations": [{"id": "eq_ke", "computes": "ke", "formula": "KE = max(0, 4.136e-15 * freq * 1e14 - metal.work_function)", "description": "Persamaan Einstein, clamp 0 untuk di bawah ambang"}], "visualizations": [{"id": "viz_1", "type": "animation", "description": "Foton datang dari kiri mengenai plat logam, elektron terlepas proporsional KE"}, {"id": "viz_2", "type": "graph", "x_axis": "freq", "y_axis": "ke", "title": "KE vs Frekuensi"}], "challenges": []}, "win_lose_condition": {"applicable": false}, "gameplay_parameters": {"scoring": {"exploration_points_per_parameter_change": 1}, "lives": null, "time_limit_seconds": null, "pass_threshold": null}}
